category_sources: Official GitHub README says the project provides tools for daily work with GDScript.
source_facts.description describes GDScript parser, linter, formatter, and related tools.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is GDScript Toolkit.
source_facts.name supplies the package/formula name gdtoolkit.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents installation, linting, formatting, parsing, metrics, GitHub Actions, and pre-commit usage.
repo_sources: Official GitHub page is Scony/godot-gdscript-toolkit and contains the project README.
source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README lists parser, static analysis linter, formatter, and code metrics calculator.
source_facts.description lists parser, linter, formatter, and GDScript.
